title: WCD Janjgir Champa Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Office Assistant, Cook and More Posts
organization: Women and Child Development Janjgir Champa
short_info: Women and Child Development Janjgir Champa (WCD Janjgir Champa) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 7 Various Contractual Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Law/Social Work/Sociology/Social Science/Psychology, Graduate in any subject, High School (10th) or equivalent from recognized board, 8th Pass
qualification.details: Residential Superintendent: Post Graduate in Law/Social Work/Sociology/Social Science/Psychology Office Assistant: Graduate in any subject Cook: High School (10th) or equivalent from recognized board Security Guard/Watchman: 8th Pass

salary_details.details: Residential Superintendent: Rs. 20900 Per Month Office Assistant: Rs. 16310 Per Month Cook: Rs. 6135 (Part Time Contract) Per Month Security Guard/Watchman: Rs. 11360 Per Month

selection_process: Merit List based on Academic Marks and Experience Skill Test / Walk-in Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Janjgir Champa Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://janjgir-champa.gov.in/en/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
